extra_commands: COOKIE_JAR=/tmp/qrb_vt.txt && rm -f $COOKIE_JAR && CSRF=$(curl -s -c $COOKIE_JAR -b $COOKIE_JAR 'https://qrbanner.com/api/auth/csrf' | node -pe "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8')).csrfToken") && curl -s -c $COOKIE_JAR -b $COOKIE_JAR -o /dev/null -w 'LOGIN_HTTP:%{http_code}\n' -X POST 'https://qrbanner.com/api/auth/callback/credentials' -H 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' --data-urlencode "csrfToken=$CSRF" --data-urlencode 'email=onur@qrbanner.com' --data-urlencode 'password=112358Onrks..' --data-urlencode 'redirect=false' --data-urlencode 'json=true'
